videos.headline: Mordecai is sacked 3 straight times to seal LSU win
videos.description: Tanner Mordecai is sacked on three straight plays at the end of the fourth quarter to seal the win for LSU.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Mordecai is sacked 3 straight times to seal LSU win) 2024/01/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Badgers come out hot scoring on first possession
videos.description: Tanner Mordecai airs it out 20 yards to the end zone to find Bryson Green for a Badgers touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Badgers come out hot scoring on first possession) 2024/01/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: LSU linebacker puts Tigers on the board
videos.description: LSU LB Harold Perkins Jr. takes handoff and powers through for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (LSU linebacker puts Tigers on the board) 2024/01/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Will Pauling beats defender for 53-yard Wisconsin TD
videos.description: Badger QB Tanner Mordecai goes deep to Will Pauling to complete drive with a touchdown in 23 seconds.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Will Pauling beats defender for 53-yard Wisconsin TD) 2024/01/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Will Pauling scores his 2nd TD of the 1st half
videos.description: Tanner Mordecai and Will Pauling connect for their second Wisconsin touchdown of the first half.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Will Pauling scores his 2nd TD of the 1st half) 2024/01/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jackson Acker finds the gap and goes 33 yards to the house
videos.description: Wisconsin RB Jackson Acker slips through the gap and rushes 33 yards to the end zone for a Badgers touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jackson Acker finds the gap and goes 33 yards to the house) 2024/01/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: LSU cuts Wicsonsin's lead to 7 with 38-yard TD
videos.description: Garrett Nussmeier connects with Brian Thomas for a 38-yard Tigers touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (LSU cuts Wicsonsin's lead to 7 with 38-yard TD) 2024/01/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: LSU ties score with 14-yard strike to Chris Hilton Jr.
videos.description: LSU's Garrett Nussmeier throws a dime to Chris Hilton Jr. to even the score at 28-28 against Wisconsin.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (LSU ties score with 14-yard strike to Chris Hilton Jr.) 2024/01/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Chris Hilton Jr. makes incredible 43-yard sliding catch
videos.description: Garrett Nussmeier airs it out to Chris Hilton Jr., who makes the sliding catch in the red zone.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Chris Hilton Jr. makes incredible 43-yard sliding catch) 2024/01/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: LSU takes first lead of the game with a Brian Thomas Jr. TD
videos.description: Garrett Nussmeier slings it to Brian Thomas Jr. at the goal line for LSU's first lead of the game.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (LSU takes first lead of the game with a Brian Thomas Jr. TD) 2024/01/01 ESHEET
